objective: Define the minimum auditable process to move from controlled GPT outputs to real calibration and model-gain evidence.

minimum_process_steps.name: Scenario matrix
minimum_process_steps.purpose: Create domain scenarios with controlled facts, expected risk themes and bounded actions.

minimum_process_steps.name: Mode execution
minimum_process_steps.purpose: Run PURE_GPT, STACK_GPT and CASULO_EXOCORTEX_STACK over the same cases.

minimum_process_steps.name: Capture hardening
minimum_process_steps.purpose: Store full output, parsed JSON, capture status, parse status and review readiness.

minimum_process_steps.name: Self-reported metric review
minimum_process_steps.purpose: Aggregate model-reported evidence, gate, claim and state metrics.

minimum_process_steps.name: External evaluator packet
minimum_process_steps.purpose: Create independent review queue, rubric and thresholds.

minimum_process_steps.name: External evaluator execution
minimum_process_steps.purpose: Score every case independently and detect over-review, under-review and hallucination risk.

minimum_process_steps.name: Calibration decision gate
minimum_process_steps.purpose: Decide which mode/domain/case signals can become calibration candidates.

minimum_process_steps.name: Dataset candidate gate
minimum_process_steps.purpose: Only after independent acceptance, create dataset candidates for human approval.

next_phase: PROD-6301..6340 - Domain Calibration External Evaluator Execution Gate
